quotes.author: Albert Einstein
quotes.quote: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
quotes.hint: A quote about balance and motion by a famous physicist

quotes.author: Stephen Hawking
quotes.quote: Remember to look up at the stars and not down at your feet.
quotes.hint: Look upward - wisdom from a renowned cosmologist

quotes.author: Marie Curie
quotes.quote: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
quotes.hint: A message about understanding from a pioneering scientist

quotes.author: Carl Sagan
quotes.quote: Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
quotes.hint: Discovery awaits - words from an astronomer

quotes.author: Nikola Tesla
quotes.quote: The present is theirs; the future, for which I really worked, is mine.
quotes.hint: An inventor reflects on time and legacy

quotes.author: Richard Feynman
quotes.quote: The first principle is that you must not fool yourself.
quotes.hint: Honesty in thinking - from a legendary physicist

quotes.author: Galileo Galilei
quotes.quote: Passion is the genesis of genius.
quotes.hint: Ancient wisdom about inspiration and talent

quotes.author: Jane Goodall
quotes.quote: What you do makes a difference, and you have to decide what kind of difference you want to make.
quotes.hint: About impact and choice from a conservationist

quotes.author: Bill Nye
quotes.quote: Science rules!
quotes.hint: A famous catchphrase about science

quotes.author: Isaac Newton
quotes.quote: If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.
quotes.hint: Gratitude for those who came before

quotes.author: Dorothy Hodgkin
quotes.quote: You look at science or at least talk of it as something very complicated.
quotes.hint: A chemist questions perception of science

quotes.author: Rosalind Franklin
quotes.quote: You look at science or at least talk of it as something very complicated.
quotes.hint: Scientific complexity - from a pioneering chemist

quotes.author: Steve Jobs
quotes.quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
quotes.hint: About the power of innovation

quotes.author: Grace Hopper
quotes.quote: The most dangerous phrase in the language is, 'We've always done it this way.'
quotes.hint: A computer pioneer questions tradition

quotes.author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
quotes.quote: The Universe is a pretty big place. If it's just us, seems like an awful waste of space.
quotes.hint: Cosmic perspective on existence

quotes.author: Rachel Carson
quotes.quote: In every outthrust headland, in every curving beach, in every grain of sand there is the story of the earth.
quotes.hint: Nature's narrative - from an environmental writer

quotes.author: Elon Musk
quotes.quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.
quotes.hint: Determination in the face of difficulty

quotes.author: Katherine Johnson
quotes.quote: We counted. We computed. We analyzed. We launched.
quotes.hint: A mathematician describes space exploration

quotes.author: Hedy Lamarr
quotes.quote: Most women would like to be prettier than they are. Most men would like to be richer than they are.
quotes.hint: Social commentary from an actress-inventor

quotes.author: Alan Turing
quotes.quote: Can a machine think? This question may be compared with the question, 'Can a machine swim?'
quotes.hint: A computer pioneer questions machine consciousness

quotes.author: Vera Rubin
quotes.quote: Science is something very human. It's done by human beings who have real personalities and real lives.
quotes.hint: Humanizing science from an astronomer

quotes.author: Hidden Figures
quotes.quote: We have a problem and we are going to solve it.
quotes.hint: Determination from a famous film about scientists

quotes.author: Back to the Future
quotes.quote: Where we are going, we do not need roads.
quotes.hint: A legendary line from a time-travel movie

quotes.author: The Martian
quotes.quote: I am going to have to science the heck out of this.
quotes.hint: Problem-solving on Mars from a film

quotes.author: Dylan Thomas / Interstellar
quotes.quote: Do not go gentle into that good night.
quotes.hint: A famous poem quoted in a space film

quotes.author: The Big Bang Theory
quotes.quote: Bazinga!
quotes.hint: A catchphrase from a TV show about scientists

quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin
quotes.quote: Tell me and I forget, teach me and I may remember, involve me and I learn.
quotes.hint: About learning methods from a founding father

quotes.author: Carl Sagan
quotes.quote: For small creatures such as we, the vastness is bearable only through love.
quotes.hint: Deep thoughts on love and scale

quotes.author: Ada Lovelace
quotes.quote: The Analytical Engine has no pretensions whatever to originate anything. It can only do what we know how to order it to perform.
quotes.hint: An early computer programmer's insight

quotes.author: Richard Dawkins
quotes.quote: The universe does not have a purpose, but we do.
quotes.hint: Meaning-making from an evolutionary biologist

quotes.author: Walt Disney
quotes.quote: All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
quotes.hint: Dreams and courage from an animation pioneer

quotes.author: The Emperor (Mulan)
quotes.quote: The flower that blooms in adversity is the most rare and beautiful of all.
quotes.hint: Sage advice from an emperor in a Disney film

quotes.author: Rafiki (The Lion King)
quotes.quote: Oh yes, the past can hurt. But from the way I see it, you can either run from it or learn from it.
quotes.hint: A wise mandrill in the savanna

quotes.author: Moana
quotes.quote: The ocean chose you for a reason.
quotes.hint: A girl called by the sea

quotes.author: Anton Ego (Ratatouille)
quotes.quote: Not everyone can become a great artist, but a great artist can come from anywhere.
quotes.hint: A food critic changes his mind

quotes.author: Edna Mode (The Incredibles)
quotes.quote: I never look back, darling. It distracts from the now.
quotes.hint: A superhero costume designer's mantra

quotes.author: Gandalf (The Lord of the Rings)
quotes.quote: All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
quotes.hint: Guidance from a gray wizard

quotes.author: Samwise Gamgee (The Lord of the Rings)
quotes.quote: There's some good in this world, and it's worth fighting for.
quotes.hint: Hope from a faithful friend

quotes.author: Aragorn (The Lord of the Rings)
quotes.quote: A day may come when the courage of men fails, but it is not this day.
quotes.hint: A king rallies his army

quotes.author: J. R. R. Tolkien
quotes.quote: Faithless is he that says farewell when the road darkens.
quotes.hint: A line from a fantasy epic's verse

quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.
quotes.quote: The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.
quotes.hint: A civil rights leader on justice

quotes.author: John F. Kennedy
quotes.quote: We choose to go to the Moon in this decade not because it is easy, but because it is hard.
quotes.hint: A presidential pledge about space

quotes.author: Barack Obama
quotes.quote: If you're walking down the right path and you're willing to keep walking, eventually you'll make progress.
quotes.hint: Perseverance from a modern president

quotes.author: Winston Churchill
quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.hint: Resolve in the face of adversity

quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt
quotes.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.hint: Optimism from a First Lady

quotes.author: Maya Angelou
quotes.quote: You will face many defeats in life, but never let yourself be defeated.
quotes.hint: Resilience from a celebrated poet

quotes.author: Confucius
quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.hint: Steady progress from an ancient philosopher

quotes.author: Socrates
quotes.quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
quotes.hint: Humility from a classical thinker

quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi
quotes.quote: The best way to find yourself is to lose yourself in the service of others.
quotes.hint: Service and self-discovery from a peacemaker

quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai
quotes.quote: One child, one teacher, one book, and one pen can change the world.
quotes.hint: Education can transform the world

quotes.author: Neil Armstrong
quotes.quote: That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind.
quotes.hint: First words from the Moon

quotes.author: Sally Ride
quotes.quote: Science is fun. Science is curiosity. We all have natural curiosity.
quotes.hint: America's first woman in space on curiosity

quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee
quotes.quote: The Web does not just connect machines, it connects people.
quotes.hint: The inventor of the World Wide Web on connection

quotes.author: Niels Bohr
quotes.quote: An expert is a person who has made all the mistakes that can be made in a very narrow field.
quotes.hint: On expertise from a Nobel laureate in physics

quotes.author: Florence Nightingale
quotes.quote: I attribute my success to this: I never gave or took an excuse.
quotes.hint: Determination from the founder of modern nursing

quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci
quotes.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.hint: A Renaissance polymath on elegant design

quotes.author: Thomas Edison
quotes.quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quotes.hint: An inventor on work and inspiration

quotes.author: Donald Knuth
quotes.quote: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.
quotes.hint: A computer scientist warns about priorities

quotes.author: Linus Torvalds
quotes.quote: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.hint: Open-source pioneer on action over words

quotes.author: Claude Shannon
quotes.quote: Information is the resolution of uncertainty.
quotes.hint: The father of information theory on information

quotes.author: Yoda (Star Wars)
quotes.quote: Do or do not. There is no try.
quotes.hint: A Jedi Master's concise advice

quotes.author: Spock (Star Trek)
quotes.quote: Live long and prosper.
quotes.hint: A Vulcan salute in words

quotes.author: The Matrix
quotes.quote: There is no spoon.
quotes.hint: A mind-bending lesson from a sci-fi film

quotes.author: Albus Dumbledore
quotes.quote: It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
quotes.hint: Wisdom from a headmaster about character

quotes.author: Harvey Dent (The Dark Knight)
quotes.quote: You either die a hero or live long enough to see yourself become the villain.
quotes.hint: A stark line about heroism and time

quotes.author: Tony Stark (Iron Man)
quotes.quote: Sometimes you gotta run before you can walk.
quotes.hint: A futurist pushes to move fast

quotes.author: The Mandalorian
quotes.quote: This is the way.
quotes.hint: A creed repeated by armored warriors

quotes.author: Gene Kranz (Apollo 13)
quotes.quote: Failure is not an option.
quotes.hint: A mission control mantra

quotes.author: Mae Jemison
quotes.quote: Never limit yourself because of others' limited imagination.
quotes.hint: An astronaut on self-belief and vision

quotes.author: John Muir
quotes.quote: The mountains are calling and I must go.
quotes.hint: A naturalist hears the call of wild places

quotes.author: Jane Austen
quotes.quote: There is no charm equal to tenderness of heart.
quotes.hint: A novelist on kindness and character

quotes.author: Aristotle
quotes.quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.hint: Ancient philosophy on practice and excellence

quotes.author: Plato
quotes.quote: The beginning is the most important part of the work.
quotes.hint: A philosopher emphasizes strong starts

quotes.author: Archimedes
quotes.quote: Give me a lever long enough and a fulcrum on which to place it, and I shall move the world.
quotes.hint: A physicist on leverage and possibility

quotes.author: Hypatia
quotes.quote: Reserve your right to think, for even to think wrongly is better than not to think at all.
quotes.hint: A scholar defends independent thought

quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke
quotes.quote: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
quotes.hint: One of Clarke's three laws

quotes.author: Isaac Asimov
quotes.quote: Science gathers knowledge faster than society gathers wisdom.
quotes.hint: A writer reflects on progress and prudence

quotes.author: Margaret Mead
quotes.quote: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it is the only thing that ever has.
quotes.hint: An anthropologist on the power of groups

quotes.author: Alan Kay
quotes.quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.hint: A computer pioneer on building tomorrow

quotes.author: Henry Ford
quotes.quote: Whether you think you can, or you think you can't, you're right.
quotes.hint: Mindset from an industrial innovator

quotes.author: Ian Malcolm (Jurassic Park)
quotes.quote: Life finds a way.
quotes.hint: A chaotician's famous line

quotes.author: George Orwell
quotes.quote: Who controls the past controls the future. Who controls the present controls the past.
quotes.hint: A warning from 1984 about power and history

quotes.author: Aldous Huxley
quotes.quote: Community, Identity, Stability.
quotes.hint: The motto of a manufactured society

quotes.author: Aldous Huxley
quotes.quote: Facts do not cease to exist because they are ignored.
quotes.hint: Truth persists even when overlooked

quotes.author: Margaret Atwood
quotes.quote: Better never means better for everyone. It always means worse for some.
quotes.hint: Unequal outcomes in a controlled society

quotes.author: Ray Bradbury
quotes.quote: It was a pleasure to burn.
quotes.hint: A stark opening line about censorship

quotes.author: Suzanne Collins
quotes.quote: May the odds be ever in your favor.
quotes.hint: A televised ritual's chilling catchphrase

quotes.author: Lois Lowry
quotes.quote: We gained control of many things. But we had to let go of others.
quotes.hint: The cost of sameness in a controlled world

quotes.author: Veronica Roth
quotes.quote: Becoming fearless isn't the point. That's impossible. It's learning how to control your fear.
quotes.hint: Courage defined in a factioned city

quotes.author: Cormac McCarthy
quotes.quote: You forget what you want to remember, and you remember what you want to forget.
quotes.hint: Memory in a bleak journey

quotes.author: Philip K. Dick
quotes.quote: Reality is that which, when you stop believing in it, doesn't go away.
quotes.hint: A mind-bending definition of reality

quotes.author: Frank Herbert
quotes.quote: Fear is the mind-killer.
quotes.hint: A line from the Bene Gesserit litany

quotes.author: Ursula K. Le Guin
quotes.quote: It is good to have an end to journey toward; but it is the journey that matters, in the end.
quotes.hint: Wisdom on goals and journeys from a sci-fi master

quotes.author: Robert A. Heinlein
quotes.quote: Specialization is for insects.
quotes.hint: A polymath's creed from a classic author

quotes.author: Octavia E. Butler
quotes.quote: All that you Touch You Change. All that you Change Changes you.
quotes.hint: Interdependence in a parable of change

quotes.author: William Gibson
quotes.quote: The future is already here—it's just not evenly distributed.
quotes.hint: On uneven arrival of the future from a cyberpunk pioneer

quotes.author: Dory (Finding Nemo)
quotes.quote: Just keep swimming.
quotes.hint: A fish's simple persistence mantra

quotes.author: Buzz Lightyear (Toy Story)
quotes.quote: To infinity and beyond!
quotes.hint: A space ranger's battle cry

quotes.author: Olaf (Frozen)
quotes.quote: Some people are worth melting for.
quotes.hint: A snowman's warmhearted line

quotes.author: Ellie (Up)
quotes.quote: Adventure is out there!
quotes.hint: A rallying cry from a book of dreams

quotes.author: Lilo & Stitch
quotes.quote: Ohana means family. Family means nobody gets left behind or forgotten.
quotes.hint: A Hawaiian lesson on belonging

quotes.author: Seneca
quotes.quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.hint: Stoic wisdom on making your own luck

quotes.author: Amelia Earhart
quotes.quote: The most effective way to do it, is to do it.
quotes.hint: An aviator's take on action

quotes.author: W. Edwards Deming
quotes.quote: In God we trust; all others must bring data.
quotes.hint: Quality guru's demand for evidence

quotes.author: Peter Drucker
quotes.quote: What gets measured gets managed.
quotes.hint: Management insight on metrics and behavior

quotes.author: Rumi
quotes.quote: What you seek is seeking you.
quotes.hint: A mystic poet on attraction and purpose
